session.user: Run `make fast-ci` and report results. This is a YAML-only change so we expect all checks to pass.
session.assistant: I'll run the `make fast-ci` command to verify that all checks pass for this YAML-only change.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run fast-ci target to check all tests

session.assistant:
The `make fast-ci` command failed due to **Prettier formatting issues** in 2 files, not because of test failures. Let me identify which files need formatting:
**Result Summary:**
- Lint: PASSED - Type checking (ty): PASSED - Unit tests (erk): 5970 passed - Unit tests (erk-dev): 136 passed - Unit tests (erk-statusline): 115 passed - Unit tests (erk-mcp): 30 passed - **Prettier formatting check: FAILED** - 2 files have code style issues
The failures are in these 2 documentation files: 1. `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md` 2. `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md`
These need Prettier formatting fixes. Since this is a YAML-only change as you mentioned, these Prettier violations appear to be pre-existing issues in the documentation, unrelated to the YAML modifications in your current branch.
